beginnerGuide.title: Guide to Adopting Humans Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: This beginner guide explains the complete starting experience in the Guide to Adopting Humans universe, including preparing a suitable environment, selecting adoption preferences, completing early interactions, and building a stable relationship through daily activities.

steps.title: Prepare Your Adoption Space
steps.description: Create a comfortable living area with essential furniture, personal items, and interaction spaces before beginning the adoption process.

steps.title: Complete Adoption Registration
steps.description: Review available human profiles, understand compatibility information, and complete the initial adoption requirements.

steps.title: Meet Your Adopted Human
steps.description: Start the first interaction phase by learning preferences, personality traits, and communication styles.

steps.title: Build Daily Routines
steps.description: Maintain satisfaction through regular conversations, activities, care actions, and relationship-building events.

steps.title: Unlock Relationship Progression
steps.description: Increase trust levels to access new interactions, customization options, and advanced adoption features.

quickTips: Eligibility checks and a complete application decide your guardian tier and matching pool.
A prepared living space with rest, feeding, and interaction zones speeds up the first meeting.
Track what works with each human in a bonding journal to refine your daily care.
Early trust milestones unlock new interactions and customization options faster than rushing.

humanTypesTierList.title: Guide to Adopting Humans Human Types Tier List
humanTypesTierList.intro: This tier list organizes human types in the Guide to Adopting Humans universe by their relationship requirements, adaptability, personality balance, and overall adoption difficulty.

tiers.title: Balanced Human Types
tiers.description: Highly adaptable humans with stable personalities and strong compatibility across different living environments.

tiers.title: Independent Human Types
tiers.description: Reliable choices for adopters who prefer lower maintenance routines and flexible interaction schedules.

tiers.title: Specialized Human Types
tiers.description: Humans with unique preferences that provide rewarding interactions but require more specific care strategies.

tiers.title: Challenging Human Types
tiers.description: More demanding personalities that require advanced communication skills and additional relationship management.

adoptionProcess.title: Guide to Adopting Humans Adoption Process
adoptionProcess.intro: This Guide to Adopting Humans adoption process guide explains the full journey, including choosing candidates, completing evaluations, meeting adopted humans, and progressing through long-term events.

steps.title: Submit Adoption Application
steps.description: Begin the process by selecting adoption preferences and providing required information.

steps.title: Human Compatibility Evaluation
steps.description: Review personality traits, preferences, and compatibility factors before making a decision.

steps.title: Complete Matching Phase
steps.description: Choose the most suitable human match based on lifestyle and relationship goals.

steps.title: First Meeting Event
steps.description: Experience the first interaction and establish the foundation of the relationship.

steps.title: Develop Long-Term Bond
steps.description: Continue relationship progression through shared activities, events, and personalized care.

personalityGuide.title: Guide to Adopting Humans Personality Guide
personalityGuide.intro: Each adopted human in the Guide to Adopting Humans universe has unique personality patterns that affect conversations, daily routines, emotional reactions, and relationship progression. Understanding these traits helps adopters provide better support and unlock deeper interactions.

rows.traits: Explores new ideas, asks questions, enjoys discovering new experiences
rows.tips: Provide new experiences and encourage discovery

rows.traits: Values personal space, makes decisions confidently, prefers freedom
rows.preferences: Flexible schedules, private areas, self-directed activities
rows.tips: Avoid excessive control and respect personal choices

rows.traits: Enjoys conversations, group activities, and emotional connections
rows.preferences: Frequent interaction, shared activities, community events
rows.tips: Maintain regular communication and positive feedback

rows.traits: Strong emotional responses and high awareness of surroundings
rows.tips: Use gentle communication and maintain emotional stability

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Guide to Adopting Humans

questions.question: Is Guide to Adopting Humans a real game?
questions.answer: No. Guide to Adopting Humans is a fictional sci-fi universe and fan-made wiki, not a commercial game or app.

questions.question: What is the matching system in Guide to Adopting Humans?
questions.answer: The matching system is the universe's dynamic compatibility engine. Instead of following fixed pairings, you analyze traits and discover which guardian profiles and human types fit best.

questions.question: Where can I read Guide to Adopting Humans?
questions.answer: All content is available right here on the wiki, free to read in your browser with no payment or account required.

questions.question: Does the Guide to Adopting Humans wiki cost anything?
questions.answer: No. The Guide to Adopting Humans wiki is completely free to read.

questions.question: Does the Guide to Adopting Humans wiki support mobile and dark mode?
questions.answer: Yes. The site is fully responsive and includes a dark theme toggle for comfortable reading on phones, tablets, and desktops.

questions.question: Will the Guide to Adopting Humans wiki keep getting updates?
questions.answer: Yes. New guides, human types, and lore entries are added regularly as the universe expands.
